summary: Post-refactor backend regression test for server.py modularization (analytics, reports, daily_status, target_planning, master_locations, proxies, bottle_preview moved to /app/backend/routes/). 41/41 tests PASSED against preview URL. No regressions detected.
action_items: Refactor verified - safe to redeploy to production from user's perspective.

Note: Two initial failures (activity-metrics, weather) were test-side issues (missing required query params). Fixed by supplying required params. Endpoints themselves correctly returned 422 validation errors, confirming Pydantic validation works post-refactor.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at ~9140 lines is still large. Consider extracting remaining endpoint groups (accounts, leads, invoices, production, meetings, tasks) into routes/ in subsequent iterations to get under 2000 lines.
Good: refactor preserved route paths, auth dependency wiring, and request/response schemas - all 41 regression tests green on first run (after test-side param fixes).
Suggest adding an /api/health or /api/ root endpoint returning 200 for smoke checks; currently returns 404.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_regression.py (new regression test file, 41 tests covering all refactored + untouched endpoints)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded tenant data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New regression file at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_regression.py runs 41 tests in ~6s against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Covers auth, dashboard, analytics, reports, daily-status, target-planning, master-locations, proxies, bottle-preview, plus 17 untouched GET endpoints and cogs-by-city. Use this as smoke test after any future server.py refactor or route changes.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found. Refactor is clean; all moved endpoints return 200 with expected shapes and all previously-working untouched endpoints remain functional.
